constants.description: Game constants, configuration, and static data. No dependencies on other layers.

domain.description: Core game logic, board state, move validation, scoring calculations. Owns all business rules.

application.description: Game orchestration, turn management, strategy dispatch, undo/redo. Coordinates between domain and UI.

presentation.description: Rendering, event handling, DOM manipulation, feature flag reading.

bootstrap.description: Entry points and HTML structure. Initialize game on page load.

rules.message: Constants layer has no outbound dependencies (it is imported by all)

rules.rationale: Domain layer uses constants for game rules

rules.message: Domain must not depend on Application layer (core logic must be independent)
Domain must not depend on Presentation layer (core logic must be UI-agnostic)

rules.rationale: Application uses constants for game rules
Application orchestrates domain logic and board state
Application imports presentation strategies (BoardRenderer, StatusRenderer, etc.) to configure the strategy pattern. Ideally decoupled via dependency injection, but currently acceptable.
Presentation uses constants for rendering configuration
Presentation reads domain state for display (read-only access through public methods)
Presentation calls game.executeStrategy() to dispatch user actions
Bootstrap can import all layers for initialization
